falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (7-day moving average) with a 5% gain in 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the pattern's implied consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX Volatility Index drops below 15 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extremely low volatility would contradict the 'blowoff' pressure (score 42) by indicating complacency, not impending panic selling.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant escalation in blowoff pressure would falsify the current 'HOLD' by proving the pattern is nearing a definitive top, not a bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
